name: PropStream Real Estate Data and Lead Generation API
what_it_does: PropStream real estate data and lead generation REST API for real estate investors, wholesalers, and agents to access comprehensive property data including ownership records, equity data, lien information, foreclosure status, MLS history, and skip tracing — enabling targeted property prospect list building, lead generation, and investment property analysis through PropStream's national property database covering 153M+ US property records. Enables AI agents to manage property search for investment prospect automation, handle ownership lookup for landlord contact automation, access equity analysis for motivated seller identification automation, retrieve foreclosure data for distressed property automation, manage MLS history for price trend automation, handle skip tracing for owner contact discovery automation, access lien data for encumbrance analysis automation, retrieve list building for direct mail campaign automation, manage driving for dollars for mobile prospecting automation, and integrate PropStream with CRM and marketing automation for end-to-end real estate investment pipeline automation.
use_cases: Building targeted property prospect lists for real estate wholesale and investment automation agents
Accessing property ownership records and skip tracing for investor outreach automation agents
Analyzing equity positions and foreclosure status for motivated seller identification automation agents
Integrating PropStream property data with CRM for real estate investment pipeline automation agents
not_for: Licensed MLS data for active listing syndication (PropStream uses MLS history, not live listings)
Mortgage origination and underwriting data (PropStream is investor/lead gen focused, not lender tools)
Consumer home search platforms (PropStream is investor/professional tools, not consumer-facing)
best_when: A real estate investor, wholesaler, or investment platform wanting AI agents to build property prospect lists, identify motivated sellers, access ownership and equity data, and run skip tracing through PropStream's 153M+ record national database.
avoid_when: DPPA AND FCRA COMPLIANCE REQUIRED: PropStream data includes personal contact information subject to Driver's Privacy Protection Act and Fair Credit Reporting Act; automated unrestricted contact data use creates DPPA/FCRA violation; automated must use data only for permitted purposes (real estate investment, not employment/credit screening). SKIP TRACING HAS CREDIT COST: Skip tracing lookups consume per-record credits; automated bulk skip trace without credit management creates unexpected cost overrun; automated must budget and monitor skip trace credit consumption. DATA FRESHNESS VARIES BY COUNTY: PropStream property data is county-recorder sourced with varying update frequencies; automated real-time data assumption creates stale ownership record errors; automated must account for data lag (days to weeks) for recently transferred properties. LIST EXPORT HAS SUBSCRIPTION LIMITS: PropStream monthly export limits vary by subscription tier; automated unlimited export assumption creates export_limit_exceeded; automated must track and manage monthly export allowance.

auth.notes: PropStream uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Corona, CA HQ. Founded 2017 by Brian Tepke. Products: Property search, ownership data, equity analysis, foreclosure tracking, MLS history, skip tracing, driving for dollars mobile app, list builder, marketing tools. SDKs: None public. 153M+ US property records. Monthly subscription with credit-based skip tracing. DPPA, FCRA data use restrictions. Real estate investor/wholesaler focused. Competes with DealMachine and ATTOM for real estate investor data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 7-day trial available; production requires monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: $99/month base; skip tracing credits additional; export limits by plan tier
pricing.notes: Corona CA. $99/month. DPPA, FCRA. Credit-based skip tracing. 153M+ US property records.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; property search and skip trace APIs throttled; no webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: DPPA COMPLIANCE REQUIRED: PropStream contact data is subject to DPPA (Driver's Privacy Protection Act); automated unrestricted contact data use creates federal law violation; automated must use contact information only for DPPA-permitted purposes (real estate investment) and maintain use case documentation

SKIP TRACING COSTS CREDITS: Each skip trace lookup consumes per-record credits from subscription; automated bulk skip trace without budget control creates cost overrun; automated must implement credit budget monitoring and user-level authorization before batch skip tracing

COUNTY RECORDER DATA LAG: PropStream property ownership data sources from county recorder with days-to-weeks update lag; automated real-time ownership assumption creates stale recent-sale records; automated must account for data lag for recently transferred properties

MONTHLY EXPORT LIMITS: PropStream subscription tiers have monthly list export limits; automated unlimited bulk export assumption creates export_limit_exceeded; automated must track monthly export consumption and implement limit-aware batching

FCRA PROHIBITS CERTAIN USES: PropStream data cannot be used for credit/employment/tenant screening; automated general-purpose contact data use creates FCRA violation; automated must implement use case restrictions and user attestation for compliant data access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Real estate investor data. DPPA, FCRA, CCPA. API key. US. Personal contact and property ownership data. Strict use case restrictions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real estate investor data. DPPA, FCRA, CCPA. API key. US. Personal contact data. Strict regulated data use.
